role_assignments_client_subtype_check.name: role_assignments_client_subtype_check
role_assignments_client_subtype_check.value:
(
        ("role_assignments"."portal_type" = 'client' and "role_assignments"."client_subtype" is not null)
        or
        ("role_assignments"."portal_type" <> 'client' and "role_assignments"."client_subtype" is null)
      )

milestones_tenant_isolation.name: milestones_tenant_isolation
milestones_tenant_isolation.using:
"milestones"."project_id" IN (
          SELECT id FROM projects
          WHERE contractor_organization_id = current_setting('app.current_org_id', true)::uuid
        )
        OR "milestones"."project_id" IN (
          SELECT project_id FROM project_organization_memberships
          WHERE organization_id = current_setting('app.current_org_id', true)::uuid
            AND membership_status = 'active'
        )
milestones_tenant_isolation.withCheck:
"milestones"."project_id" IN (
          SELECT id FROM projects
          WHERE contractor_organization_id = current_setting('app.current_org_id', true)::uuid
        )
        OR "milestones"."project_id" IN (
          SELECT project_id FROM project_organization_memberships
          WHERE organization_id = current_setting('app.current_org_id', true)::uuid
            AND membership_status = 'active'
        )

milestones_kind_start_date_check.name: milestones_kind_start_date_check
milestones_kind_start_date_check.value:
("milestones"."kind" = 'marker' AND "milestones"."start_date" IS NULL)
        OR ("milestones"."kind" = 'task' AND "milestones"."start_date" IS NOT NULL)

saved_reports_schedule_coherence_check.name: saved_reports_schedule_coherence_check
saved_reports_schedule_coherence_check.value:
(
        "saved_reports"."schedule_cron" is null
        and "saved_reports"."schedule_label" is null
        and "saved_reports"."schedule_timezone" is null
        and "saved_reports"."next_run_at" is null
      ) or (
        "saved_reports"."schedule_cron" is not null
        and "saved_reports"."schedule_timezone" is not null
      )

          WHERE organization_id = current_setting('app.current_org_id', true)::uuid
            AND membership_status = 'active'
        )

closeout_package_comments_scope_shape.name: closeout_package_comments_scope_shape
closeout_package_comments_scope_shape.value:
(
        ("closeout_package_comments"."scope" = 'package' AND "closeout_package_comments"."section_id" IS NULL AND "closeout_package_comments"."item_id" IS NULL)
        OR ("closeout_package_comments"."scope" = 'section' AND "closeout_package_comments"."section_id" IS NOT NULL AND "closeout_package_comments"."item_id" IS NULL)
        OR ("closeout_package_comments"."scope" = 'item' AND "closeout_package_comments"."section_id" IS NOT NULL AND "closeout_package_comments"."item_id" IS NOT NULL)
      )

prequal_project_exemptions_tenant_isolat.name: prequal_project_exemptions_tenant_isolation
prequal_project_exemptions_tenant_isolat.using:
"prequal_project_exemptions"."project_id" IN (
          SELECT id FROM projects
          WHERE contractor_organization_id = current_setting('app.current_org_id', true)::uuid
        )
        OR "prequal_project_exemptions"."project_id" IN (
          SELECT project_id FROM project_organization_memberships
          WHERE organization_id = current_setting('app.current_org_id', true)::uuid
            AND membership_status = 'active'
        )
prequal_project_exemptions_tenant_isolat.withCheck:
"prequal_project_exemptions"."project_id" IN (
          SELECT id FROM projects
          WHERE contractor_organization_id = current_setting('app.current_org_id', true)::uuid
        )
        OR "prequal_project_exemptions"."project_id" IN (
          SELECT project_id FROM project_organization_memberships
          WHERE organization_id = current_setting('app.current_org_id', true)::uuid
            AND membership_status = 'active'
        )
